northwest-weight-wellness-center-everett.sessionDuration: Vitamin IV therapy typically takes between 45 minutes and an hour.
northwest-weight-wellness-center-everett.whatIsIncluded: Customizable blend of vitamins and minerals administered by registered nurses. Menu of vitamin add-ons. Drips include Natural Defense (immune boost), Hydration, and Glutathione. Infusion fully customized to individual needs.
northwest-weight-wellness-center-everett.firstVisitInfo: Wear short sleeves or loose sleeves you can roll up. Drink lots of water before your appointment. Eat a wholesome meal or snack shortly before. You may experience a sensation of coldness or stiffness near the IV, which is normal.

drip-gym-jackson-heights-jackson-heights.sessionDuration: IV treatments typically last between 30 to 60 minutes.
drip-gym-jackson-heights-jackson-heights.whatIsIncluded: Each IV drip delivers 100% bioavailability of vitamins and minerals directly into the bloodstream via saline base plus customized vitamin cocktail. Booster shots available as add-ons. Licensed registered nurse administers all treatments.
specialties: Alpha Lipoic Acid Weight Loss IV
drip-gym-jackson-heights-jackson-heights.priceNote: Single session starts at $250. Gold Membership $220/month (1 drip/month + 15% off). Platinum Membership $415/month (2 drips/month + 25% off).

faces-in-bloom-vancouver.sessionDuration: Your bag of fluids will take approximately 45 minutes to infuse.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.whatIsIncluded: A customized blend of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants delivered directly into the bloodstream. Cocktail of vitamins customized with your provider. You are seated in a comfortable lounge chair for the duration.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.firstVisitInfo: Come in comfy, eat a light meal, avoid caffeine and alcohol, bring entertainment. No downtime. New patients receive $50 off their first treatment.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.frequency: Monthly IV subscription available — members receive one IV each month.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.priceNote: $160 per infusion. Monthly subscription $160/month includes one IV per month plus exclusive add-on pricing.

pnw-hydration-wellness-puyallup.whatIsIncluded: Each customized IV includes rehydration with 500mL of IV fluids and electrolytes plus vitamins, minerals, and nutrients tailored to individual goals. Shot Bar and booster add-ons available. Mobile services available for an additional fee.
pnw-hydration-wellness-puyallup.frequency: Recommended 1–4 times a month depending on goals and symptoms.
pnw-hydration-wellness-puyallup.priceNote: Pricing not publicly listed. Does not accept insurance.

iv-elements-hoboken.whatIsIncluded: IV drips delivering fluids, vitamins, minerals, and electrolytes directly into the bloodstream. Custom IV mixes. Registered nurses administer all treatments under supervision of a medical doctor and board-certified advanced practice nurse.

iv-elements-hoboken.priceNote: Hydroboost $149 at the lounge. Mobile IV service starts at $85 additional. Packages available (must be used within 5 months).

medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.sessionDuration: Approximately 60–90 minutes depending on whether you are a returning or first-time patient. Infusions are tailored to infuse over an hour; venous flow ultimately determines duration.
medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.whatIsIncluded: Proprietary IV infusion blends using 100% certified and sterile ingredients from FDA-registered facilities. Customized for immunity, detox, sports performance, energy, skin rejuvenation, and overall well-being. Vitals checked and infusion options discussed at the start of each appointment.
medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.firstVisitInfo: Arrive well hydrated and having eaten some protein at least one hour prior. Wear layered clothing as body temperature may vary. Bring something to do. Walk-ins welcome; appointments recommended. No membership required.
medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.priceNote: IV infusions range from $155–$1,000. Cash pay clinic — no insurance or co-pays. $100 fee for cancellations less than 24 hours prior. PRO Club members may charge to their membership account.

pure-skiin-spokane-valley.whatIsIncluded: IV fluids and essential nutrients delivered directly into the bloodstream. Customized blend of vitamins, minerals, and hydration tailored to individual goals. Consultation prior to starting to ensure perfect blend.

reviv-new-york-iv-therapy-nad-glutathion.priceNote: Hydromax IV Therapy $119. REVIV Electrolyte Therapy $79. NAD+ 100mg IM Injection $99. $25 consultation fee required for all IV therapies.
